political.s: FEC: $16K PAC donations; 81% to Republican, 19% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $14M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.13% of revenue) via Hershey Company Charitable Trust. Operates the The Hershey Foundation: $1.1M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).
charity.focus: Cocoa farming communities, child labor elimination, children's education/nutrition, community development

environment.s: environmental violation: $11K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: Terms-of-service privacy grade E (very poor) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 389:1 (median employee pay $64,007) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.industry: manufacture of cocoa, chocolate and sugar confectionery
wiki.extract: The Hershey Company, often called Hershey or Hershey's, is an American multinational confectionery company headquartered in Hershey, Pennsylvania, which is also home to Hersheypark and Hershey's Chocolate World. The Hershey Company is one of the largest chocolate manufacturers in the world; it also manufactures baked products, such as cookies and cakes and beverages like milkshakes, as well as other products. The Hershey Company was founded by Milton S. Hershey in 1894 as the Hershey Chocolate Company, originally established as a subsidiary of his Lancaster Caramel Company. The Hershey Trust C

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was dumping trash into the compactor from a rolling utility tilt cart. While lowering the utility cart from the tilted position to dump the trash, the employee s right little finger was caught between the cart s metal frame and the compactor frame. The employee suffered a fingertip amputation.

news_items.title: Hershey's and Patrick Renna Spark Nationwide Debate Over How to Make the Perfect S'more - PR Newswire
news_items.summary: Hershey's partnered with actor Patrick Renna to promote a campaign debating the correct way to make a s'more.
